## Discussion

Each meta parameter contained in this dictionary affects only the sound event instance when you change the parameter’s value at runtime. As a read-only dictionary, the framework sets the contents based on the parameter you pass into a node definition initializer, for example, [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESwitchNodeDefinition/init(switchMetaParameterDefinition:)]. The dictionary key is the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMetaParameter/identifier] of the source [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMetaParameterDefinition].

# metaParameters

**Instance Property**

The object’s meta parameters.

## Declaration

```swift
var metaParameters: [String : PHASEMetaParameter] { get }
```

## Discussion

Each meta parameter contained in this dictionary affects only the sound event instance when you change the parameter’s value at runtime. As a read-only dictionary, the framework sets the contents based on the parameter you pass into a node definition initializer, for example, [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESwitchNodeDefinition/init(switchMetaParameterDefinition:)]. The dictionary key is the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMetaParameter/identifier] of the source [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMetaParameterDefinition].



## Configuring Mixers and Metaparameters

- **mixers**: Nodes in the event tree that control the volume of their child nodes.
